who: medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient conversion of billing codes causes submission errors. We automate the conversion instead of manual entry of billing codes into insurance forms.
problem: Inefficient conversion of medical billing codes into insurance submission files.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing specialists
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to medical billing specialists with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among billing specialists
try_it: Let users try manual code entry interface and error-checking for billing codes on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
